norm_1.content: Customers should maintain quiet during meals.
norm_1.subject: customers

norm_2.content: Individuals ought to respect others' personal space.
norm_2.subject: individuals

norm_3.content: Patrons must pay for their own orders.
norm_3.subject: patrons

norm_4.content: People should avoid loud phone conversations.
norm_4.subject: people

norm_5.content: Most patrons dispose of trash in designated bins.
norm_5.subject: most patrons
